error_message: Cannot update a component (`BrainiacProvider`) while rendering a different component (`ChatBubble`).
root_cause: Called another component's context setter (brainiac.show(...)) from inside a useState functional updater (setOpen((v) => { ...; brainiac.show(...); return next; })). React treats the updater function body as part of render, so any setState call inside it (even for a different component's state) is flagged as a render-phase side effect.
fix: Read the current state value directly in the event handler to decide whether to call brainiac.show(), then call setOpen separately, instead of doing it inside the updater callback. See components/chat-bubble.tsx toggleOpen().
